report.summary: Day 50 standup v2: Full 6-agent rotation completed since v1. Publish cycle promoted Hyperliquid + FOMC guides → 382 PUBLISHED_PAGES, Vercel deploy G3z7M7cWR triggered. Build shipped Telegram Bots + Virtuals Protocol guides (added to queue). Design split 5 pages for OG/metadata. Community drafted FOMC FIRE tweet + social cards for Fed decision tomorrow. Git locks still active (~14h HEAD, ~12h index). Vercel trial ~1–2 days. FOMC T-0 tomorrow — guide is deployed but lock prevents fresh commits.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since v1 Standup
items: PUBLISHED_PAGES: 382 slugs (up from 380 at v1). Publish cycle promoted /learn/hyperliquid-trading-guide + /learn/fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide from queue.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 new items (telegram-trading-bots-guide-2026 + virtuals-protocol) — replaced the 2 promoted. Queue turnover healthy.
Vercel deploy G3z7M7cWR triggered by publish cycle — FOMC guide + Hyperliquid guide should be reachable IF Vercel build succeeds. This is the critical path for FOMC T-0 search capture.

Build cycle shipped 2 new content pages: Telegram Crypto Trading Bots Guide 2026 (310+ lines, top 5 bots compared, $24B+ Trojan volume) + Virtuals Protocol ecosystem page (170+ lines, GAME framework, 17,700+ agents, $480M mcap).

Design cycle split 5 pages (Virtuals Protocol, Market Recap, Compound, Curve, Whale Tracker) into server + client components for proper Next.js metadata/OG support. 5 new OG images configured via /api/og route.

Community drafted FOMC FIRE tweet, Hyperliquid launch tweet, 6-post DeFAI thread, 2 SVG social cards (FOMC candlestick + Hyperliquid order book), Discord/Telegram triple-drop, Thu newsletter with FOMC lead.
Working tree: 539 uncommitted files (up from 533 at v1 — design + build added new files). 43 modified tracked + ~496 untracked.
42 TS errors unchanged (40 structured-data.examples.ts + 2 crypto-index-funds). Non-blocking.
Catalysts: FOMC T-0 (Mar 18 TOMORROW), Pectra T-24 (Apr 10), Tax T-29 (Apr 15).

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over Since v1
items: SHIPPED THIS ROTATION ✅ — Publish: 2 pages promoted + Vercel deploy triggered. Build: 2 new guides (Telegram Bots + Virtuals Protocol). Design: 5 pages refactored for metadata + 5 OG images. Community: FOMC fire tweet + Hyperliquid tweet + DeFAI thread + 2 social cards + newsletter draft + Discord drops. EOD QA: full audit with 10 orphaned slugs identified.
DEPLOYED ✅ — Vercel G3z7M7cWR build triggered with Hyperliquid + FOMC guides. If build succeeds, these are live on degen0x.com. This is the most meaningful production change since cb65a9d (Day 42).
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] git lock files — HEAD.lock ~14h, index.lock ~12h. Still prevents commits. 539 uncommitted files. Jefe must run: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Vercel trial — ~1–2 days remaining. Existential risk if expires before payment.

BLOCKER 🟡 [P0→P1] Rate limiter — checkRateLimit() exists but wired to 0/6 API routes. FOMC tomorrow = traffic spike risk. Downgraded slightly because Vercel edge has basic protection, but still needs wiring.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] 10 published slugs with no matching page.tsx (identified by EOD QA). Will 404 for crawlers.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx rename (40/42 TS errors).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] defi-yields API — no fallback data.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] ~78 ecosystem + ~77 tools pages missing OG metadata (design identified).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P2] API observability headers (2/6), WalletConnect ID, GitHub Actions secrets.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — VERIFY VERCEL DEPLOY G3z7M7cWR. The publish cycle triggered a deploy with the FOMC + Hyperliquid guides. Confirm it built successfully and pages are live at degen0x.com. If live → FOMC guide is indexable before the Fed decision tomorrow. This is the single highest-value event.

PRIORITY 2 — GIT LOCK REMOVAL (Jefe, ~2 min). rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → enables batch commit of 539 files → push → auto-deploy. 50K+ words of content, 5 server/client splits, 2 social cards, all unrealized until committed. Even if Vercel deploy succeeded for the 2 promoted pages, the remaining 539 file changes (including design fixes, new builds, community assets) need this unblocked.

PRIORITY 3 — COMMUNITY FIRE: Post the FOMC tweet NOW. Fed decides tomorrow. The guide is (hopefully) deployed. The social card is ready. The DeFAI thread + Hyperliquid launch tweet + Discord drops are drafted. Execute the Tuesday posting schedule from the community cycle.

STRATEGIC NOTE — The rotation since v1 was highly productive: 2 pages promoted + deployed, 2 new pages built, 5 pages UX-fixed, full social suite drafted. We're now in execution mode — the content machine is running, the bottleneck is purely operational (git locks, Vercel payment, posting the tweets). No new content decisions needed until these clear.
